summary: Active current context is docs/MANIFEST.json plus .agents/current/*.json and the small active docs set. Historical markdown logs live under docs/archive and must not be read by default.
PROGRESS.md, root AUDIT.md, Mini App fix/audit/review logs and merge handoff docs are archived as historical evidence, not current instructions.
Default current context is now AGENTS.md plus .agents/state.json only. Other docs are read by scope; archive and logs are not read by default.
